---
title: "plot genotype, phenotype data for multiple models"
author: "Andrea Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

## evolving sociality data
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
wd_path <- normalizePath(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(wd_path)
base_data_folders <- c("../../data/stab_with_e")
r_data_folder <- "../r_data/cons_with_e"
regimes <- c("fit", "ave", "ext")  #  = erse_variance, "var" = variance
if(!dir.exists(r_data_folder)) dir.create(r_data_folder, recursive = TRUE)

# ---- Helper: choose the generation key column name ----
.gen_key <- function(d) {
  if ("tick" %in% names(d)) return("tick")
  if ("generation" %in% names(d)) return("generation")
  names(d)[1]
}
```

# load all data
```{r}
data_type_to_load <- c("data", "genotype", "phenotype", "fitness", "allele")

for (data_type in data_type_to_load) {
  cat("Loading data type:", data_type, "\n")

  folders <- file.path(base_data_folders, data_type)

  extract_metadata <- function(path) {
    rx <- "n_(\\d+)_psi_(-?[0-9.]+)_sz_(-?\\d+)_reg_(fit|ext|ave)_(\\d+)\\.tsv"
    m  <- regexec(rx, path)
    p  <- regmatches(path, m)[[1]]

    if (length(p) != 6) {
        # Otherwise, keep the warning for genuine regex mismatches
        stop("Could not extract metadata from path: ", path,
                " with match: ", paste(p, collapse = ", "))
        return(data.frame())
    }
    
    data.frame(
        n          = as.integer(p[2]),
        psi        = as.numeric(p[3]),
        shift_size = as.integer(p[4]),
        reg        = p[5],               
        rep        = as.integer(p[6]),
        file_id    = basename(path),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  dfs <- lapply(folders, function(folder) {
      if (!dir.exists(folder)) {
          warning("Folder does not exist: ", folder)
          next
      }

      file_list <- list.files(
          path = folder,
          pattern = "\\.tsv$",
          full.names = TRUE,
          recursive = TRUE
      )

      # Read and combine all files
      df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(file_list, function(file) {
          df <- tryCatch(read.table(file, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE),
                      error = function(e) NULL)
          if (is.null(df)) {
              warning("Failed to read: ", file)
              return(NULL)
          }

          meta <- extract_metadata(file)
          if (nrow(meta) == 0) return(NULL)

          # # Attach metadata columns
          df$n          <- meta$n
          df$shift_size <- meta$shift_size
          df$reg        <- meta$reg
          df$rep        <- meta$rep
          df$file_id    <- meta$file_id
          df$psi        <- meta$psi

          df
      }))
      df <- df[ , sort(names(df))]
    
      return(df)
  })

  df <- do.call(rbind, dfs)
    
  if (data_type == "data") {
    saveRDS(df, file = paste0(r_data_folder, "/data_summary.rds"))
  }else if (data_type == "genotype") {
    # genotype_df <- df
    saveRDS(df, file = paste0(r_data_folder, "/genotype.rds"))
  }else if (data_type == "phenotype") {
    # phenotype_df <- df
    saveRDS(df, file = paste0(r_data_folder, "/phenotype.rds"))
  }else if (data_type == "fitness") {
    # fitness_df <- df
    saveRDS(df, file = paste0(r_data_folder, "/fitness.rds"))
  }else if (data_type == "allele") {
    # allele_df <- df
    saveRDS(df, file = paste0(r_data_folder, "/allele.rds"))
  }

  cat("Done loading data type:", data_type, "\n")
}
```



```{r}
unique(colnames(summary_stat_df))
unique(summary_stat_df[summary_stat_df$reg ==  & summary_stat_df$psi == 0.5, ]$rep)
```



```{r}
# Save
saveRDS(fitness_df, file = "../r_data/constant_env/fitness_norm.rds")
```

```{r}
# Later (or on another machine)
data_df <- readRDS("../r_data/fluc_env_cpsi/summary.rds")
```

```{r}
print(unique(summary_stat_df$reg))
```

## load effect size data
```{r}



```
